steps.title: Find the required contrast
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between Vulpes zerda and Sterkiella histriomuscorum. The notes identify the contrast: the fennec fox has sixty-four chromosomes, while Sterkiella histriomuscorum has over 15,000.

steps.title: Check the irrelevant choices
steps.content: Choice B describes only Sterkiella histriomuscorum, so it does not make the required comparison. Choice C states a similarity: both organisms have chromosomes. Choice D describes only the fennec fox. The remaining choice compares both chromosome counts and emphasizes the large difference. The answer is A.
